name: Video Frame Extractor
description: Extract frames from any video file at configurable intervals. Supports start/end time ranges, multiple output formats, and custom frame rates.

params.name: video_path
params.label: Video File
params.hint: Full path to the video file on your computer.

params.name: quality
params.label: JPEG Quality (1-100)
params.hint: Only applies to JPG output. Higher = better quality, larger files.

params.name: start_time
params.label: Start Time (optional)
params.hint: Leave blank to start from beginning.

params.name: end_time
params.label: End Time (optional)
params.hint: Leave blank to extract until end of video.

params.name: resize_width
params.label: Resize Width (0 = original)
params.hint: Resize frames to this width (maintains aspect ratio). 0 keeps original size.
